delete.title: Delete resource
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {resource}?

kubeconfigPath.label: Kubeconfig path
kubeconfigPath.desc: Path to kubeconfig file. Leave empty to use default (~/.kube/config).

pollInterval.label: Poll interval
pollInterval.desc: How often to refresh data from the cluster (in seconds).

showErrorBadge.label: Show error badge
showErrorBadge.desc: Show a badge on the bar widget when a pod is in Error or CrashLoopBackOff state.

terminal.label: Terminal emulator
terminal.desc: Terminal emulator for kubectl describe/logs. Leave empty to use $TERMINAL.

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.desc: Color of the bar widget icon.

panelWidth.label: Panel width
panelWidth.desc: Width of the panel in pixels.

panelHeight.label: Panel height
panelHeight.desc: Height of the panel in pixels.
